Final crop should not leave plain τ∈[0,H] inside prose.

Inset relation: Zint=Tmα∩RUA.

Zint↓q=3

remains calligraphic only when the source explicitly asks for it.

       local overlap   T_m^α┌───────────┐│ 蓝色椭圆  │ Z_int│     ∩     ││ 绿色矩形  │└───────────┘   R_UA
control action→ ‖ v_u(t)

Negative controls: version 2.9.0, date 2026-06-29, URL https://example.com/a/b, and A/B testing remain text.
